title: Colby Adcock’s Scout AI raises $100M to train its models for war: We visited its bootcamp
title_zh: Colby Adcock 的 Scout AI 融资 1 亿美元用于训练战争模型：我们探访了其训练营
abstract: We visited Scout AI's training ground where it's working on AI agents that can help individual soldiers control fleets of autonomous vehicles.
abstract_zh: 我们探访了 Scout AI 的训练场地，该公司正在开发能够帮助单个士兵控制多辆自主车辆的 AI 智能体。
tldr_zh: Scout AI 融资 1 亿美元训练战争 AI 智能体
cover_zh: 士兵一人控多车？Scout AI 融资 1 亿美元训练战争智能体
